p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests with origin: repo_tests: (1) test_repo_prettier_readme - runs npx prettier --check on README.md, (2) test_repo_ts_syntax_tracing - uses @babel/parser to verify TypeScript syntax of all tracing test files, (3) test_repo_otel_v2_imports_resolve - validates OTel v2 packages can be imported and used at runtime. All 3 p2p tests verified passing in Docker on base commit. CI commands identified from .github/workflows/test-template.yml (prettier-check) and repository structure (TypeScript validation, OTel v2 runtime checks). Total 5 p2p tests (2 static + 3 repo_tests) and 4 f2p tests.

validate.judge_note: Default 0.5 when no API keys available (expected in env without GEMINI_API_KEY or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY)
validate.notes: All validation checks passed: Docker build OK, NOP test correctly failed (reward=0), GOLD test all 9 tests passed (reward=1). Rubric judge returned 0.5 due to missing API keys (expected fallback behavior). Tests properly validate OTel v2 migration (resourceFromAttributes, ATTR_SERVICE_NAME/VERSION, spanProcessors, parentSpanContext, trace.setGlobalTracerProvider).
